executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to missing or inaccessible GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' could not be found in the repository 'loginkarun/scib_demo' on branch 'main'. This is a critical configuration error preventing any build execution.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' does not exist or is not accessible in the repository.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' is missing from the repository or the GitHub Actions workflow is not properly configured. Possible causes include: (1) Workflow file was never created, (2) Workflow file was deleted, (3) Workflow file is in wrong location, (4) GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository, (5) Authentication token lacks workflow permissions.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or restored. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Multiple Build Attempts Failed with Same Error
errors.description: Three consecutive build attempts (attempt-1, attempt-2, attempt-3) all failed with the same workflow file not found error, indicating a persistent configuration issue rather than a transient failure.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The error persisted across multiple retry attempts, confirming that this is not a temporary API issue but a fundamental configuration problem with the repository setup.
errors.impact: Build automation is completely non-functional. Manual intervention required to create or restore the workflow configuration file.

recommended_fixes.title: Create GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing '.github/workflows/build.yml' file with proper Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create the workflow file with standard Maven build steps including checkout, Java setup, Maven build, and test execution.
manual_steps: 2. Create build.yml file with workflow_dispatch trigger
3. Configure Java version and Maven build steps
4. Add test execution and artifact upload steps
6. Verify workflow appears in GitHub Actions tab
recommended_fixes.validation: After creating the file, verify by: (1) Checking file exists in repository, (2) Workflow appears in Actions tab, (3) Manual workflow dispatch succeeds

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Actions Permissions
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the authentication token has proper permissions to access and trigger GitHub Actions workflows.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Validate token permissions include 'workflow' scope and repository has Actions enabled.
manual_steps: 1. Check GitHub token permissions include 'workflow' scope
2. Verify repository Settings > Actions > General is enabled
3. Confirm workflow permissions allow read/write access
4. Test token with GitHub API to list workflows
recommended_fixes.validation: Token should successfully list workflows via API: GET /repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows

compliance_notes: Configuration error prevents build execution and compliance validation
No build artifacts generated - compliance checks cannot be performed
Audit trail shows 3 failed attempts with consistent error pattern
Remediation requires infrastructure change (workflow file creation)

audit_log.analysis_method: Log file parsing and error pattern recognition
audit_log.notes: No GitHub Actions run ID available due to workflow dispatch failure. Error classification based on HTTP 404 response from workflow dispatch endpoint.
